error_signature: Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service
title: Invalid request format for Apollo API
symptom: When sending an array of job titles in the HTTP node, the API returns an error stating that the request is invalid or could not be processed.
not_this_if: Sending parameters in the request body instead of query string
root_cause: The user is attempting to send query parameters as JSON in the body of the request, while the API expects them to be included in the URL as query string parameters. This confusion leads to the API receiving an incorrect format.
fix_steps: Enable 'Send Query Parameters' in the HTTP node settings.
Add the required parameters in the query string format, e.g., person_titles[]=sales%20director.
agent_instruction: Change the HTTP node to send parameters as query strings instead of JSON in the body.
